proposal.claim: aggregate ack signatures: O(n) individual sigs to O(1) aggregate
proposal.structural_delta: communication complexity: ack messages shrink from O(n) sigs to O(1)
proposal.diff:
--- a/log_replication.tla
+++ b/log_replication.tla
@@ -20,5 +20,5 @@
 AckEntry(replica, entry_id) ==
-  /\ acks' = [acks EXCEPT ![entry_id] = acks[entry_id] \cup {<<replica, Sign(replica, entry_id)>>}]
+  /\ acks' = [acks EXCEPT ![entry_id] = AggregateSig(acks[entry_id], replica, entry_id)]

review.argument: aggregation applies cleanly, distinct signers on same entry_id

structural_verification.evidence: AckEntry produces single aggregate instead of set of individual sigs
